visual_description: A low-angle, static shot captures a nighttime city scene. The camera looks up at several tall, modern buildings against a dark sky. A few windows on the buildings are illuminated, casting a cool light. In the foreground, a streetlamp glows brightly, illuminating the tops of some dark green trees. In the upper left corner of the frame, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The audio opens with a low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score, creating a feeling of tension and anticipation. The sound of hurried footsteps on a hard surface, like concrete stairs, quickly grows louder, suggesting a group of people in a hurry. The scene cuts to an interior shot of a group of men walking down a staircase inside a building. The men are dressed in business casual attire, mostly light blue button-down shirts and dark trousers. The man in the center, wearing a tie, walks with a determined pace, looking down the stairs. Other men follow closely behind him. The staircase has metal railings and is lit by overhead lights. The same white Chinese characters, "风行网," remain in the upper left corner. The camera remains stationary, capturing the group as they descend.
